review_reason: Phase 7 requires well-founded iteration machinery for DenselyOrdered proof. 6 sorries remain: 4 DenselyOrdered iteration cases, 2 NoMax/NoMin reflexive cases. Mathematical argument is clear but implementation requires Nat.strongRecOn with subformulaClosure termination measure.

partial_progress.details: Phase 6 completed: Boneyard archival, DensityFrameCondition trimmed to 278 lines with 0 sorries. Phase 7 partial: DenselyOrdered base case proven (c not equivalent to endpoints), first iteration level implemented with Temporal 4 transitivity. 6 sorries remain requiring well-founded iteration.

errors.message: DenselyOrdered and NoMax/NoMin proofs require well-founded iteration with subformulaClosure termination measure. Each iteration uses a different distinguishing formula from finite set, ensuring termination.
errors.recommendation: Implement iteration using Nat.strongRecOn with fuel = subformulaClosure(anchor).card. Track consumed formulas to prove measure decreases. Consider restructuring types to avoid circular dependency.
